coverage_check.summary: Complete coverage: 3496/3496 candles present. No gaps detected.

missing_candle_check.summary: Zero missing candles. Every expected timestamp from 1780753380000 to 1780963080000 at 60000ms cadence is present.

duplicate_check.summary: No duplicate timestamps detected in the 3496-row dataset.

ordering_check.summary: All 3496 rows are strictly increasing by ts_ms with consistent 60000ms cadence.

timeframe_consistency_check.summary: Dataset adheres to strict 1m cadence: every pair of consecutive rows is exactly 60000ms apart.

symbol_window_metadata_check.summary: Symbol is consistent (BTCUSDT throughout). Window metadata matches provenance_manifest.json and dataset_spec.json.

dataset_fingerprint_check.summary: Content SHA-256 verified: d79a1c3c81191dcf4418ae0c2b2775a6f354ed0cc6801a6955904871c4077605 matches provenance manifest and dataset_spec.json.

limitations: Dataset is controlled_lab_evidence, not natural_paper_evidence. It originates from MEXC WS persistent capture (real venue data), pre-dates any replay run, but lacks the full SIGNAL->DECISION->ORDER->FILL chain required for natural paper classification.
regime_id is null for all 3496 rows. The regime service was not running during MEXC WS capture, so this dataset cannot currently feed strategy_backtest_runner without a regime-assignment bridge.

File-backed replay dry-run succeeds (dataset loads, config validates), but full replay fails at execution provenance derivation due to the missing regime_id requirement in build_primary_breakout_historical_bridge.
Venue match is confirmed (venue=mexc, venue_match=true), making this dataset suitable for venue-aware replay once regime assignment is resolved.
